violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Duct tape being used on chest freezer are not a cleanable surface.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The table underneath the flattop needs to be cleaned more thoroughly.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use drinking cups were stored on the ground in the dry storage closet.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Soap dispenser for the bar hand sink was not working at the time of inspection.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Paper towel dispenser for the bar hand sink was not working at the time of inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors throughout the facility need a more thorough cleaning.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mop being stored on the floor in the kitchen needs to be placed in a place where it can dry properly.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
